prompt: Describe what happens at a farmers market. Do not use any adjectives or adverbs. Use only nouns, verbs, prepositions, articles, and pronouns.
response: People come to a farmers market. Farmers bring fruit, vegetables, eggs, bread, cheese, meat, flowers, and honey. Vendors set up tables and tents. Buyers walk through rows and look at food and plants. People talk with farmers and ask about crops, prices, and farms. Farmers answer questions and tell stories about weather, soil, seeds, and harvests. Buyers pick items and put them in bags and baskets. Vendors weigh produce and take cash and cards. Children eat snacks and drink juice. Musicians play songs. Friends meet and talk. Neighbors greet one another. People eat, shop, and spend time with family and friends. At the end, vendors pack goods, take down tents, and leave the market.
